title: Chapter 12
content:
Chapter 12: Aisha

Denzel stood up very quickly and walked along to where the man was leading him.

He could trust him because he showed quite a bit in old Denzel’s memories on the good side, even though he was having a hard time remembering his name and it would be weird to ask him his name after knowing him for so long apparently

He was just now eager to find out about the job that will be paying him 10 gold coins every month just for physical labour.

"It’s here, Denzel" the man stopped and pointed at the direction of a large building

They finally arrived at the location, it was the house of the village chief. The building stood was the only duplex that could be sighted in the entire village and stood out as the most attractive and beautiful house in the entire village

’Now I see how the employee would be able to 10 gold coins just for physical labour’

"Okay, so how do I get started on this job" Denzel said looking towards the direction of the man

"Just wait here let me get her, she’ll do the explanation " the man spoke as he went inside the building

’Her? I thought I was working for the village chief’ Denzel thought

The man that brought him there took some time before he came out, but this time he came out with someone else that made Denzel’s eyes and imagination linger

It was a woman who was around the age of his mother, Maria, and almost as beautiful but she falls short just slightly.

It was hard to not notice her and when you do notice her, you can’t take your eyes off her.

She wore a short blouse which did a bad job in covering her massive breasts and exposed the upper portions of her breasts which swayed and bounced with every movement she made.

Her skirt was so tight and short that her curves could be seen right through it. Her ass swaying with every step she took towards Denzel, Denzel just staring.

’I thought I’ve seen the best in Maria but damn...this is a close contender’

It was a short distance between her and Denzel and Denzel’s eyes locked into her breasts as she moved towards him, her breasts swaying and bouncing as she approached him.

They then got closer to him

"Aisha, this is Denzel and Denzel this is Aisha, and as you already know she is the village chief’s wife. She is the one you will be working for" the man spoke

’The village chief’s wife? The village chief definitely has some good taste in women picking out this one, I bet he is someone I could get along with him even despite the age gap’

"Pleasure to meet you madam" Denzel said with his hand stretched out towards her for a handshake

She completely ignored his handshake and crossed her hands right below her breasts as she took a deep breath causing her breasts to bounce up and down.

’Hm...that’s a weird reaction, let’s just say she is not the shaking type’ Denzel thought

"Is this the one that’s going to be taking the job? On first sight he looks...incompetent" Aisha said

’Saying that right in front of me? I tried to give her the benefit of the doubt but nah...she’s definitely going to be a rude one’

"Yes, I’m vouching for him just give him the opportunity" the man spoke

"If you say so then, my husband wouldn’t condone me bring another man into the house for whatever reason, but the son of a bitch is never even around to find out if I did. Tch"

She looked at Denzel up and down like she was analysing him and the face she displayed after showed pure disgust and disappointment in Denzel

’She’s really done it, this freaking bitch. I never had plans to make you one of my harem members but I’m definitely going to and I’m going to make you beg for my cock and make you my personal slut’ Denzel thought

"Follow me" she said as she turned in a swift manner and moved towards the house

"I recommended you for this job, Denzel so please don’t mess it up" the man said

"Thank you very much, you came to me in my time of need I definitely will not let you down by any means" Denzel replied back to him, his face showing gratitude

The man tapped him on the shoulder and left in the direction they came from

Denzel then moved into the building with her not knowing what to expect staying alone with this saucy bitch. He already had a goal in mind, to tame and make her one if his personal sluts.

Denzel entered the building and locked the door behind him, the house was more beautiful than it presented to be on the outside. Not the best compared to the houses in his old world but compared to where he stayed currently in this world, you could say this was luxury.

Aisha was already seated on the right side of the apartment her legs crossed and pointing at Denzel.

Denzel looked her direction

"What do I have to do miss Aisha" Denzel spoke

She frowned

"Don’t ever speak my name out of your mouth, call me madam from now henceforth" she spoke

’Oh my...this bitch is really getting on my nerves!’ Denzel thought

"I’m sorry, madam. So how do I get started" Denzel spoke

"I’m sure, Sir Carlos already briefed you on what type of job you applied for right?" Aisha spoke

’Carlos! Yes, that was his name. He was a really good friend of my drunkard father but never indulged in his ways. A good man for real’ Denzel thought

"Yes, he said it was physical labour hence why a man was needed " Denzel spoke

As he said that, Aisha chuckled as in saying ’you think you also qualify as a man? Hilarious’

Making Denzel all the more pissed of at her

"Well, he wasn’t wrong. You’ll be helping me move luggage from upstairs to downstairs, that is..."

She stretched out a bit longer before continuing

"...if you can" she finished her sentence

~~~
